title: DFU - Low Battery - Checking DFU pop up if at least one earbud is at low battery
scenario: DFU/Software Update shows "Update currently not available, please try back later" popup when at least one earbud has low battery (<5%)
steps: Ensure at least one earbud has low battery (less than 5%) — this can be the right earbud, left earbud, or both.
Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
Attempt to perform a DFU/Software Update.
expected: A popup appears with the message: "Update currently not available, please try back later". After tapping OK, the user is returned to the Device Settings > Software Update screen.
